allow: Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./data/tools.json'\); console.log\('Total tools:', t.length\); const cats={}; t.forEach\(x=>{cats[x.category]=\(cats[x.category]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('By category:', cats\); console.log\('Featured:', t.filter\(x=>x.featured\).length\); console.log\('Slugs:', t.map\(x=>x.slug\).length\)")

Bash(node -e "const t=require\('./data/tools.json'\); const cats={}; t.forEach\(x=>{cats[x.category]=\(cats[x.category]||0\)+1}\); console.log\('Total:', t.length\); console.log\('By category:', JSON.stringify\(cats, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Featured:', t.filter\(x=>x.featured\).length\); const slugs=t.map\(x=>x.slug\); const dup=slugs.filter\(\(s,i\)=>slugs.indexOf\(s\)!==i\); console.log\('Duplicate slugs:', dup\)")
